description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and tie. The figure stands upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. The head features a neatly styled, short haircut and a well-groomed beard. Notably, the figure wears a headset with a microphone, indicating possible engagement in communication or professional activity. The shoes are formal, matching the business attire, and the overall build is proportionate and realistic. The suit appears tailored, with visible lapels and fitted trousers.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit with a headset and microphone, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has a short, styled haircut and formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit, tie, headset, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the headset's microphone and the profile of the suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, hairstyle, and the headset band.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the suit's profile and the headset from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
